findings.summary: The October 1, 2024 guideline states that age is not the sole factor and most type 1 diabetics develop the condition before puberty. The October 2025 version contains the exact same text and logic, indicating no substantive update to the classification criteria.
findings.detail: October 1, 2024 (Older): Age is not the sole determining factor, though most type 1 diabetics develop the condition before reaching puberty. -> October 2025 (New Version): Age is not the sole determining factor, though most type 1 diabetics develop the condition before reaching puberty.
